name: context7
description: Up-to-date library documentation lookup. Use to fetch current docs for any library, framework, SDK, API, or CLI tool.

name: pdap-docs
description: Semantic search across internal PDAP product documentation. Resolves doc IDs and pulls full sections with citations.

name: orchestrator
description: Pipeline routing, plan tracking, PAL review queueing, and session resolution. Required for /run, /phase, /finish skills.

name: pal-mcp
description: Multi-model code review, deep analysis, consensus, and pre-commit gate. OpenAI / Anthropic cross-validation backbone.

name: sap-gui-control
description: Drive SAP GUI scripting sessions from Claude. Reads transactions, navigates screens, captures field values.
